pull-request-header: 🚀 Release proposal. **Merging this PR approves the release** — no CI path merges it (merge is the human's, REQ-C1.4). After merge, run `scripts/release-publish.sh` to sign and publish the annotated tag; CI never tags (REQ-C1.3), publishing is human-gated and signed per repo policy (see `doctrine/release-tagging.md`). The version bump and release notes are below.
